title: pergularia extensa
intro: Pergularia extensa, also known as Pergularia tomentosa, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against oxidative stress and neurodegenerative diseases. Pergularia extensa can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
